title: Diff / Promotion review 文件 viewed progress
goal: 让 bundle diff 和 promotion review 都能按文件标记已查看，并显示当前 diff pair 的 reviewed progress，减少大 bundle 评审时的记忆负担。
scope: 新增共享 useFileReviewProgress hook，按 diff pair key 维护会话级 viewed file set
Diff mode summary 增加 Reviewed x/y 指标
Diff mode 文件 rail 和详情 header 增加已查看状态与 checkbox
Promotion review 的 bundle diff header 增加 x/y reviewed
Promotion review 文件 rail 和代码面板增加已查看状态与 checkbox
新增 Playwright E2E 覆盖 diff 与 promotion review 的 viewed progress
更新 README、产品体验评审、完成度审计、摩擦审计、任务日志和本任务规格/计划
out_of_scope: 服务端持久化 viewed progress
promotion 必须全部 reviewed 才能提交
reviewed progress 和 eval case / diff hunk 的关联
多人协作 reviewed 状态
verification: Red: cd apps/web && UV_CACHE_DIR=/Users/xx/Documents/code/skills-manager/.uv-cache npx playwright test e2e/skills-workbench.spec.ts --project=chromium -g "compare standard bundle versions|review a candidate version before promoting" -> failed as expected because reviewed progress UI did not exist

Green: cd apps/web && UV_CACHE_DIR=/Users/xx/Documents/code/skills-manager/.uv-cache npx playwright test e2e/skills-workbench.spec.ts --project=chromium -g "compare standard bundle versions|review a candidate version before promoting" -> 2 passed
